title: Jason Huang

Welcome
Hi, I’m Jason Huang. This is my FIN 533 project website for Design and Testing of Algorithmic Trading Systems with Python.

title: Jason Huang
text:
About This Course
This course is centered around a final project, completed in teams, hosted on the Fintech 533 site.

title: Jason Huang
text:
What We’re Building
We are designing and testing algorithmic trading systems using Python, covering strategies such as pairs trading, momentum, and signal filtering.
